sub_modules.gaussian3x3: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil using fixed 1-2-1 separable coefficients normalized by 16.
sub_modules.high_freq_sub: Combinational pointwise subtraction producing signed high-frequency detail from original minus blurred pixel.
sub_modules.gain_scale: Combinational pointwise signed multiply of high-frequency detail by the runtime gain input.
sub_modules.reconstruct_sat: Combinational pointwise reconstruction and saturation to the PIXEL_W output range.
